topbar.acarsLong: Aircraft Communication Addressing and Relay System
topbar.buildOnNostr: Build your airline on Nostr. New here? Start with a browser wallet.
topbar.newHereStart: New here? Create a free account instantly — no sign-up needed.
topbar.newHereStartDesktop: New here? Start free in one click.
topbar.nsecLabel: Already have a Nostr secret key? Paste your nsec1 to sign in.
topbar.haveNsec: I already have an nsec key
topbar.exportRecoveryKey: Export your recovery key anytime from here. Keep it somewhere only you can access.
topbar.disconnectedWarning: Disconnected from Nostr — changes may not save

bankruptcy.liquidatedBanner: Airline Liquidated — This airline has ceased operations
bankruptcy.liquidatedDesc: This airline has been permanently dissolved. All aircraft have been grounded and operations have ceased.
bankruptcy.chapter11Desc: Your airline's debt has exceeded the critical threshold. All flight operations have been suspended and aircraft grounded.
bankruptcy.dissolveExplain: You can dissolve this airline and start fresh with a new company, or dismiss this to review your finances in the Corporate tab.
bankruptcy.dissolveConfirm: This will permanently dissolve {{name}}. All aircraft, routes, and hubs will be lost. You will start over with a new airline.
